items.nombre: cd ~/ARKHEOS/09_Experimentos/arkhe-os || { echo "❌ No estoy en el repo"; exit 1; }
[ -f package.json ] || { echo "❌ No veo package.json acá. Estás en la carpeta incorrecta."; exit 1; }
# Backup del catálogo actual si existe
echo "➡️ Ahora voy a leer el portapapeles..."
print("❌ Portapapeles vacío. Copiá la lista (Cmd+C) y volvé a correr el bloque.")
s = "".join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != "Mn")
if any(x in n for x in ["apple","ios","mac"]): return "Plataformas: Apple"

if any(k in n for k in ["medic", "enferm", "odont", "ciruj", "psicolog", "nutric", "radiolog", "anestes", "fisioter", "veterin", "farmac", "biolog", "quimic", "fisic", "optic", "optomet", "laborator", "pediatr"]):
if any(k in n for k in ["abog", "notar", "actuar", "derecho", "criminolog", "juri", "gobierno", "administracion publica", "civismo", "politic", "juez"]):
if any(k in n for k in ["contad", "contador", "auditor", "finanz", "banca", "credito", "impuest", "econom", "mercadotec", "marketing", "administracion", "admon", "recursos humanos", "bolsa"]):

if any(k in n for k in ["ingenier", "ing.", "software", "sistemas", "comput", "informat", "electron", "electric", "telecom", "redes", "program", "arquitect", "construccion", "mecan", "diesel", "topograf", "metrolog", "instrumentacion", "control", "naval"]):
if any(k in n for k in ["educ", "docen", "profesor", "maestro", "pedagog", "telebach", "telesec", "metodologia", "orientacion escolar"]):

if any(k in n for k in ["arte", "artes", "musica", "canto", "piano", "violin", "viola", "tromp", "clarin", "fagot", "guitarr", "danza", "teatro", "escenograf", "pintur", "fotograf", "composic", "actor", "actuacion", "dj"]):

if any(k in n for k in ["secretar", "oficin", "capturista", "operador", "mantenimiento", "refrigeracion", "aire acondicionado", "cocina", "repost", "hotel", "gastronom", "turism", "ventas", "carpinter", "soldad", "pailer", "corte y confeccion", "sanitario"]):
if any(k in n for k in ["agro", "agric", "pesca", "pecuar", "hortic", "ganad", "zootecn", "forest", "acuic", "bovin", "ovinos", "porcic", "suelos", "fertiliz", "viticult", "enolog"]):
# cortar cuando viene "dos profesiones en una misma línea" con muchos espacios
"Ingeniero de Windows","Arquitecto de Windows","Desarrollador de Windows","Empleado de Windows",
"Ingeniero de Apple","Arquitecto de Apple","Desarrollador de Apple","Diseñador de Apple","Empleado de Apple",
"Ingeniero de Meta","Arquitecto de Meta","Desarrollador de Meta","Usuario experto en Meta","Profesional en estructura de Meta",
if not key or key in seen:
"funciones": ["Triage y evaluación inicial","Diagnóstico y plan de acción","Seguimiento y control","Educación al paciente","Coordinación con otros profesionales"],
"herramientas": ["Checklist clínico","Plantillas de historia/registro","Guías de práctica (base)","Protocolos de derivación","Agenda/recordatorios"],
"funciones": ["Relevar requerimientos","Diseñar solución","Implementar y probar","Documentar y versionar","Operar y mantener"],
"herramientas": ["Checklist de entrega","Plantilla ADR","Plantilla README","Plan de pruebas","Guía de troubleshooting"],
"funciones": ["Recepción y registro","Ejecución del servicio","Control de calidad","Comunicación","Cierre y reporte"],
"herramientas": ["Checklist operativo","Plantillas de reporte","Scripts de atención","Registro de incidentes","Agenda"],
"herramientas": ["Checklist de proceso","Plantillas de registro","Control de stock/insumos","Calendario","Guías base"],
"herramientas": ["Checklist base","Plantilla de reporte","Plantilla de notas","Tablero simple","Guía de pasos"],
print(f"✅ OK. Generado data/profesiones_catalogo.json con TOTAL = {len(items)}")
print("✅ EJEMPLOS:", [x["nombre"] for x in items[:8]])
echo "1) Andá a la terminal del SERVIDOR"
echo "cd ~/ARKHEOS/09_Experimentos/arkhe-os && rm -rf .next && PORT=3000 npm run dev"
